commands.name: query

options.name: --env-id
options.description:
CodeTorch environment ID (fetches ADO settings from 
environment)

options.name: --fields
options.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return

options.name: --task-id
options.description:
CodeTorch task ID (resolves target environment settings 
automatically)

commands.description: Run a WIQL query and return matching work items

commands.name: get

options.name: --env-id
options.description:
CodeTorch environment ID (fetches ADO settings from 
environment)

options.name: --expand
options.description:
Expand option: relations, none, all (default: 
relations)

options.name: --fields
options.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return

options.name: --task-id
options.description:
CodeTorch task ID (resolves target environment settings 
automatically)

arguments.name: ids
arguments.description: Work item ID(s), space or comma separated

commands.description: Get one or more work items with full details

options.name: --add-tag
options.description: Add a tag to the work item

options.name: --env-id
options.description:
CodeTorch environment ID (fetches ADO settings from 
environment)

options.name: --remove-tag
options.description: Remove a tag from the work item

options.name: --set
options.description:
Set a field value in Field=Value format 
(repeatable)

options.name: --state
options.description:
Set the work item state (e.g., Active, Closed, 
Resolved)

options.name: --task-id
options.description:
CodeTorch task ID (resolves target environment settings 
automatically)
